name: BraTS 2026 Cluster of Challenges
statusNote: 15th BraTS cluster (5 sub-challenges). Standard-track final Docker submission deadline extended to 30 Jul 2026.
prizes: Top teams invited to present at MICCAI (no cash stated)
overview: Flagship brain-tumor benchmark spanning metastases segmentation, pediatric tumors, cross-tumor generalizability (GoAT), MR inpainting and glioma histopathology.

name: FLARE 2026 Task 2 — AutoMSC
statusNote: Validation submissions open through 20 Aug; Docker testing 20–31 Aug 2026.
numCases: Multiple datasets incl. PI-CAI prostate MRI (~1,500), LUNA25, BrainMets
prizes: Top-5 cash (Amazon gift cards 300/200/150/100/100 CAD) + oral talks; certificates to top 10
overview: Build a self-configuring 3D model that adapts across diverse datasets and performs segmentation AND classification jointly, scored on accuracy and runtime efficiency.

name: FOMO26 — Foundation Model Challenge for Brain MRI
statusNote: Two tracks (methods-only, open-data). Submissions accepted until 21 Aug 2026.
numCases: ~306,207 brain MRI (FOMO300K pretraining) + few-shot downstream tasks
overview: Pretrain a brain-MRI foundation model on a large public corpus, then evaluate few-shot across 7 clinical downstream tasks (classification, segmentation, brain-age, fairness).

name: CMRxRecon 2026 — Ultra-Fast 4D Flow MRI
statusNote: Testing submission open 1 Jul – 20 Aug 2026.
prizes: Monetary awards for top-5 per task (amounts TBA)
overview: AI reconstruction of highly undersampled (10×–50×) 4D Flow MRI to cut acquisition from ~30–60 min toward sub-5-min clinical workflows.

name: HECKTOR 2026 — Head & Neck Tumor Analysis
statusNote: Testing submission open 15–25 Jul 2026 (closing very soon); final report 8 Aug.
overview: Multimodal FDG-PET/CT pipeline that segments primary tumors and lymph nodes, infers TN staging, and predicts recurrence-free survival.

name: PENGWIN 2026 — Peripelvic Fracture Segmentation & Planning
statusNote: Preliminary submissions opened 22 May; final test phase runs 17 Jul–19 Aug 2026, with results due 24 Aug.
overview: Segment fractured pelvic bone fragments in 3D CT and plan their surgical reduction (repositioning) for image-guided orthopedic trauma care.

name: Learn2Reg 2026 — Deformable Registration
statusNote: Underway since kick-off 26 May 2026; leaderboard on Codabench. Test deadline TBA.
overview: Deformable registration across two tasks: longitudinal whole-body PSMA PET/CT (before vs after therapy) and inspiratory–expiratory chest CT for lung biomechanics.

name: ODIN 2026 — Oral & Dental Report Generation
statusNote: Site launched 25 May; training data released May 2026. Submission deadline TBA.
overview: Generate structured clinical reports from dental imaging: maxillofacial reports from 3D CBCT, and orthodontic reports from 3D intraoral scans plus 2D photos.

name: autoPET V — Whole-Body PET/CT Lesion Segmentation
statusNote: Final test phase opened 15 Jul; challenge closes 1 Sep 2026.
overview: Interactive, clinician-in-the-loop lesion segmentation on whole-body FDG and PSMA PET/CT, refining predictions from corrective scribbles.

name: ISLES'26 — Ischemic Stroke Lesion Segmentation
statusNote: Submission system opened 15 Jul; Docker submission deadline 15 Aug 2026.
overview: Segment ischemic stroke lesions across acute, sub-acute and chronic phases on MRI, with a substantially expanded multi-center dataset.

name: AIMS-TBI 2026 — Traumatic Brain Injury Lesions
statusNote: Closed to new registrations; registered teams may submit final models through 23 Jul 2026.
overview: Detect and segment 3D traumatic brain injury lesions (contusions, hemorrhage, hematoma) on T1-weighted MRI in moderate-to-severe TBI patients.

name: ATM26 — Airway Tree Modeling
statusNote: Registration and training data opened 15 Jun; validation opened 15 Jul; final test runs 30 Jul–10 Sep 2026.
overview: Two-track chest-CT airway analysis: topology-preserving binary airway-tree segmentation and branch-wise anatomical labeling for bronchoscopic navigation.

name: HEADLINE — VLM Head CT Reporting
statusNote: Validation & sanity-check phases open; test phase opening soon.
overview: Benchmark vision-language models on generating diagnostic radiology reports from head CT scans.

name: BEETLE — Breast Cancer Histopathology Segmentation
statusNote: Continuous long-term benchmark — no deadlines, live leaderboard.
overview: Multiclass semantic segmentation of H&E-stained breast-cancer whole-slide images into four tissue categories, scored by Dice.

name: REG² — Reasoning-Guided Pathology Report Generation
statusNote: Test Phase 2 closed 20 Jul 2026; winners announced at MICCAI 2026.
overview: Generate pathology reports from gigapixel whole-slide images while making the diagnostic reasoning explicit — scored on clinical correctness, not text overlap.

name: Foundation Model Challenge for Ultrasound
statusNote: Final Docker submissions closed 15 Jan 2026; results and materials verification followed for ISBI 2026.
prizes: Top-10 cash + Best Paper / Presentation / Task awards
overview: Build a single foundation model performing classification, segmentation, detection and regression across diverse ultrasound organs and pathologies.

name: CXR-LT 2026 — Long-Tailed Chest X-ray Classification
statusNote: The 2026 competition closed 3 Feb 2026; final leaderboards and results are published.
overview: Multi-label, long-tailed and zero-shot classification of thoracic diseases on ~145k chest X-rays, including generalization to rare unseen classes.

name: LCR-MPI — Low-Concentration MPI Reconstruction
statusNote: Competition and paper submission deadline extended to 1 Mar 2026; challenge completed at ISBI 2026.
overview: Reconstruct high-quality field-free-line Magnetic Particle Imaging under low tracer concentration, scored by SSIM, PSNR and NRMSE.

name: RIVA — Cervical Cytology Challenge
statusNote: Final evaluation ended 20 Feb 2026; dataset openly available on Zenodo/Kaggle.
overview: Detect and classify cervical cells on a large multi-expert Pap-smear dataset (8 Bethesda classes) for precancer/cancer screening.

name: WBCBench 2026 — Robust White Blood Cell Classification
statusNote: Concluded at ISBI 2026 (11 Apr); dataset now public on Hugging Face.
overview: Robust 13-class white-blood-cell classification on 55k blood-smear images under severe class imbalance and simulated domain shift.

name: EndoUC — Ulcerative Colitis Grading in Endoscopy
statusNote: ISBI 2026 challenge; dataset released under CC BY-SA 4.0.
overview: Automated ulcerative-colitis severity scoring (Mayo Endoscopic Score, UCEIS) plus clinical image captioning from a multimodal colonoscopy dataset.

name: CSV 2026 — Carotid Plaque Segmentation & Vulnerability
statusNote: ISBI 2026 challenge; exact dates unconfirmed — presumed concluded around April 2026.
overview: Segment atherosclerotic plaque and classify its vulnerability from paired carotid B-mode ultrasound, to improve stroke-risk stratification.

name: RSNA Intracranial Aneurysm Detection
statusNote: Submissions closed 14 Oct 2025; dataset remains public on Kaggle.
overview: Detect and localize intracranial aneurysms across 13 vascular locations using multimodal CTA, MRA and MRI; some studies include 3D vessel segmentations.

name: RSNA Knee MRI AI Challenge
statusNote: Launching Spring 2026, concluding October 2026; first RSNA challenge to use both images and report text.
numCases: >5,000 knee MRI exams from 16 institutions (reports in 9 languages)
overview: Detect a range of knee abnormalities (ligament/meniscus tears, cartilage loss, effusion, synovitis) on MRI, using both images and radiology-report text.

name: PANORAMA — Pancreatic Cancer Diagnosis
statusNote: Competitive leaderboard closed (results Feb 2025; Lancet Oncology Jan 2026). Public dev dataset remains available.
overview: Benchmarks AI against abdominal radiologists for detecting and diagnosing pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) on contrast-enhanced CT.

name: BiomedSegFM — Interactive 3D Segmentation
statusNote: The CVPR 2026 submission window closed 15 May 2026; the official page now reports submission confirmations.
overview: Build a foundation model that segments 3D biomedical volumes via interactive prompts (bounding box + up to 5 correction clicks) across CT, MRI, PET, US and microscopy.

name: BiomedSegFM — Text-guided 3D Segmentation
statusNote: The CVPR 2026 submission window closed 15 May 2026; the official page now reports submission confirmations.
overview: Segment structures in 3D biomedical volumes from free-text prompts, training a text-guided segmentation foundation model spanning five modalities.

name: SELMA3D 2026 — Self-supervised Light-sheet Microscopy Segmentation
statusNote: Training data released 23 Apr and preliminary test samples 30 May; the preliminary submission phase is delayed while the host resolves a platform billing issue.
overview: Two self-supervised 3D light-sheet microscopy segmentation tracks: one under fixed-data conditions and one that permits open data for pretraining, with shared annotated fine-tuning data.

name: Grace Kim Memorial Grand Challenge — TBI/TMI/TMLI Planning
statusNote: The 2026 competition phase ended 1 May; winners were announced 22 May and present at AAPM 16–22 Jul.
anatomy: whole body, marrow and lymphoid targets
numCases: 3 practice CT/structure-set cases; competition CT set not publicly enumerated
prizes: Complimentary AAPM Annual Meeting registration for the winner in each of three planning categories
overview: AAPM-sponsored challenge to create clinically deliverable intensity-modulated total-body, total-marrow and total-marrow-and-lymphoid irradiation plans from CT and structure-set data.

name: SynthOCT Challenge 2026 — Physics-based OCT Synthesis
statusNote: The official platform is active; final code/model and camera-ready submissions are due 14 Aug 2026 after an outage-related schedule extension.
numCases: Official OCT B-scan dataset; exact case count not stated on the challenge page
overview: Generate tissue-mimicking digital phantoms that a fixed virtual scanner converts into synthetic OCT B-scans, scored for optical attenuation and speckle-statistics consistency rather than visual plausibility alone.

name: RARE26 — Early Neoplasia Recognition in Barrett’s Esophagus
statusNote: Registration and open-development algorithm submissions are active through 31 Aug; closed testing follows 1–7 Sep.
numCases: Not publicly stated; prevalence-balanced evaluation simulates ~1% early-neoplasia rate
overview: Classify Barrett’s-esophagus endoscopy images for early neoplasia using PPV at 90% recall, a metric designed for the challenge’s very low real-world disease prevalence.

name: iMED Challenge 2026 — Multi-endoscope 3D Perception
statusNote: Public validation is open; team registration closes 15 Aug and final Docker submission is due 1 Sep.
numCases: Task 1: 61 train / 19 test; Task 2: 20 synchronized multi-endoscope sequences
overview: Estimate relative camera pose between two endoscopes and synthesize held-out endoscope views in deformable surgical environments for real-time guidance and digital-twin applications.

name: TREAT-MMTB 2026 — Multimodal Tuberculosis Management
statusNote: Participation applications and the internal competition phase are open through 31 Jul; selected teams enter the external phase 1–20 Aug.
numCases: Multi-center chest X-ray cohorts from five international sites; exact case count not stated
prizes: $1,400 / $700 / $350 for each of the cavity and TB-diagnosis tracks
overview: Detect and segment TB cavities on chest X-ray and classify TB using CXR plus clinical metadata, with external validation across five international sites.

name: BIC-MAC 2026 — Cross-Modal PET Attenuation Correction
statusNote: Registration, data access and both validation and final-evaluation paths are active; registration and submissions close 15 Aug 2026.
numCases: 99 healthy volunteers; 75 training and 4 validation cases publicly described
overview: Generate a 3D pseudo-CT from non-attenuation-corrected PET, MRI and/or a topogram, then evaluate the resulting attenuation correction through reproducible PET reconstruction.

name: ORena SAVE FOCUS — Surgical Video Understanding
statusNote: Registration and a public pre-evaluation leaderboard are active; registration/pre-evaluation close 1 Sep and final Docker submissions are due 8 Sep.
numCases: Three tracks: single frame, short segment (up to 5 min), and full procedure; case count not publicly stated
prizes: Cash prize pool stated by organizers; exact allocation is on the challenge platform
overview: Benchmark vision-language models on tracking, counting and localizing foreign objects such as sponges and needles across single images, short clips and full laparoscopic procedures.

name: TopAneu 2026 — Vessel-Specific Aneurysm Analysis
statusNote: Training data are available and Grand Challenge enrolment is active; a sanity-check phase opens 1 Aug and final test submissions run 15 Aug–5 Sep.
numCases: ~850 multi-centre CTA/MRA scans with 50+ vessel-specific location classes
overview: Classify aneurysms at more than 50 vessel locations and produce vessel-specific voxel-level segmentations from CTA and MRA, with size-aware evaluation.

name: CVPR 2026 — Foundation Models for CT Diagnosis
statusNote: Challenge opened 1 Feb; final testing closed 15 May 2026 and submission confirmations were sent.
overview: Benchmarks 3D CT foundation models for whole-body diagnosis under realistic class imbalance, via linear probing and embedding aggregation of frozen encoders.

name: MRIxFields 2026 — Cross-Field MRI Translation and Harmonization
statusNote: Registration and testing are open; registration and Docker submissions close 10 Sep 2026.
prizes: Approximately $21,000 total prize pool across three tasks
overview: Translate and harmonize structural brain MRI across five field strengths, including 7T synthesis, ultra-low-field enhancement and controllable any-to-any field translation.

name: EchoRisk 2026 — Cardio-Oncology Echocardiography
statusNote: Registration is available through the official Synapse workflow; final Docker submissions are due 20 Aug 2026.
overview: Estimate left-ventricular function, classify dysfunction and predict therapy-induced cardiotoxicity from longitudinal and baseline echocardiography.

name: DoseRAD 2026 — Real-Time Radiotherapy Dose Calculation
statusNote: Training and validation remain open through 24 Aug; final testing runs 23 Jul–24 Aug 2026.
numCases: Photon and proton treatment-planning cases with Monte Carlo dose ground truth
overview: Predict clinically usable three-dimensional photon and proton dose distributions from CT or MRI and beam-delivery parameters, benchmarked against Monte Carlo calculations.

name: ReXGrounding 2026 — Free-Text Findings to 3D CT Segmentations
statusNote: The official site reports open registration and a live submission leaderboard; no closing date is published.
overview: Localize unconstrained radiology findings written in free text to precise volumetric segmentation masks in chest CT.

name: MAMA-Synth 2026 — Virtual Contrast-Enhanced Breast MRI
statusNote: Final testing closed 10 Jul 2026; official results are scheduled for 1 Aug and winners for 27 Sep.
overview: Synthesize virtual post-contrast breast MRI from pre-contrast acquisitions to reduce reliance on gadolinium while preserving diagnostically relevant enhancement.

name: FETUS 2026 — Fetal Heart Ultrasound Segmentation and Sizing
statusNote: The challenge concluded with the ISBI 2026 challenge session on 11 Apr 2026.
overview: Segment fetal cardiac ultrasound views and estimate biometric measurements under few-shot and cross-clinical-setting generalization conditions.
